mapper.insert: insert into wrong_questions (user_id, problem_id, first_wrong_at, last_wrong_at, wrong_count, last_submission_id, last_wrong_type, status, updated_at) values (#{userId}, #{problemId}, now(), now(), 1, #{submissionId}, #{wrongType}, 1, now()) on duplicate key update last_wrong_at = now(), wrong_count = wrong_count + 1, last_submission_id = values(last_submission_id), last_wrong_type = values(last_wrong_type), status = 1, updated_at = now()
mapper.select: select wq.id, wq.problem_id as problemId, p.title as problemTitle, p.difficulty as difficulty, wq.wrong_count as wrongCount, wq.last_wrong_type as lastWrongType, wq.last_submission_id as lastSubmissionId, wq.ai_summary as aiSummary, wq.status as status, wq.last_wrong_at as lastWrongAt from wrong_questions wq join problems p on p.id = wq.problem_id where wq.user_id = #{userId} order by wq.last_wrong_at desc, wq.id desc limit #{size} offset #{offset}
